metadata.title: BufferLine | Cognitive Infrastructure for Judgment Governance
metadata.description: BufferLine builds measurement and governance infrastructure for human-AI judgment delegation. Protocol, telemetry, and tools to make judgment shifts visible.
metadata.ogTitle: BufferLine | Where does the judgment go?
metadata.ogDescription: Measurement and governance infrastructure for human-AI judgment delegation.

brand.description: Judgment Delegation Visibility Protocol - A cognitive infrastructure for observing how human judgment shifts during AI interactions.
brand.note: This is NOT a product. It's a protocol specification and observation framework.

footer.tagline: Measures judgment shifts. Never evaluates them.
